selectedOwner: freshness candidate semantic policy and docs-context-freshness automation record
decision: Reject or quarantine self-publication. Publication requires a reviewer distinct from both generator and publisher, an approval receipt, immutable target revision, atomic readback, and last-known-good recovery.
evidenceRequired: Generator self-review and self-publication are rejected.
Matching reviewer and publisher identities and incomplete publication receipts are rejected.
limitations: The local policy does not grant a real person or process repository publication authority.
nonClaims: Candidate completeness does not grant reviewer, publisher, repository, or provider authority.
rollbackRevocation: Retract or quarantine the candidate, restore the last-known-good owner, and preserve the failed publication evidence.
